name: causaltrack
description: Multimodal Say-Do Gap detection — Gemini + Neo4j knowledge graph. Detects divergence between stated and observed user behaviour in research sessions.

name: synthetic-user-council
description: Agent-led ecosystem simulation for pre-deployment product research. Multi-agent pre-study assumption testing with a React/Next.js UI.

name: transcript-cleaner
description: Fix messy interview transcripts in seconds — speaker labels, filler words, fragmented turns, broken timestamps. Rule-based + model-agnostic LLM.
